title: Santander, Cantabria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Santander, Cantabria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Santander is a city in Cantabria with a population of 172,000. An elegant coastal city with a beautiful bay, stunning beaches, and the world-renowned Santander International Festival.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
